prompt:
The weekly QA flag summary is broken two ways and I've been staring at the package too long to see it. First: this week's summary came back with zero matches for every tracked term. Zero. I can literally read the word refund in three of the reviews I fed it. Doesn't matter what product or which reviews — flags list comes out empty every time. Second, and maybe unrelated: even back when it produced numbers, the analytics dashboard started rejecting our upload with "required field total_matches missing", and when I pretty-print the JSON we send I indeed see the total under some other name. The dashboard schema hasn't changed, they were very smug about that.

Repro is just: BuildSummary on any reviews containing a watchlist term, counts are all zero; Export and look at the keys. go test -race ./... shows both problems. Fix the package so the tests pass — the tests encode the dashboard schema and the counting rules we agreed with QA, so don't touch reviewflag_test.go.
